updates.title: 8th Pay Commission Basics: A look at its composition, functioning and latest updates
updates.summary: 8th Pay Commission updates outline composition, functioning and consultation process for salary and pension revision framework for central government employees and pensioners in the country.

updates.title: DA hike delayed for first time in a decade — Will it be skipped or deferred? Experts weigh in
updates.summary: Uncertainty surrounds the DA hike delay. Experts describe it as a procedural deferment rather than a cancellation, adding that arrears are expected and that the inflation-linked revision will likely be implemented retrospectively across central government salaries and pensions.

updates.title: How to pay zero income tax on ₹15.85 lakh salary under new tax regime
updates.summary: Meal vouchers, NPS and smart salary structuring can legally bring your taxable income below  ₹12 lakh and reduce your tax to zero

updates.title: Axis Mutual Fund launches defence index fund; NFO opens 10 April
updates.summary: Axis Nifty India Defence Index Fund NFO opens for subscription, tracking defence sector index amid rising global and domestic defence spending and policy support across the country.

updates.title: PPFAS's Rajeev Thakkar reveals how they bought the March dip.
updates.summary: PPFAS has been using volatility to its advantage, deploying wherever it finds opportunities and selling wherever the opportunity comes, says its CIO Rajeev Thakkar

updates.title: PFRDA launches NPS Swasthya, enabling subscribers to use retirement funds for healthcare
updates.summary: Powered by Medi Assist’s ‘Maven’ infrastructure, the initiative enables eligible NPS subscribers to access a portion of their retirement corpus for hospitalisation expenses, while continuing to benefit from long-term market-linked growth.

updates.title: ADB says India’s GDP growth to moderate to 6.9% in current fiscal before accelerating to 7.3% next year
updates.summary: ADB said the moderation in growth is on account of heightened global uncertainty due to the West Asia conflict, higher energy prices and volatile trade and financial conditions.

updates.title: India inflation likely rose to 3.4% in March 2026: Mint poll
updates.summary: While India’s inflation remains low, it is beginning to accelerate, with March CPI projected at 3.4% as rising fuel costs and a fading base effect offset the relief provided by a US-Iran ceasefire.
